verdict: NuFace uses FDA-cleared microcurrent to stimulate facial muscles and improve contour through electrical stimulation rather than ingredients. Portability and ease-of-use explain the 3789 reviews.

_research.name: NuFace Mini Portable Facial Toning Device
pros: No ingredients needed—safe for all skin types
_research.con: Results plateau after 6 months and require maintenance sessions to prevent regression.
